Messiah Freeman || Cookout Crush

· · ────── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ────── · ·

You and Dallas have been friends for as long as you both been started attending Evergreen University. After all, you had a dorm to split and very little personal space other wise. He was an asshole—still and asshole, but you both go close anyways.

Close enough for him to invite you to his home town for the week in summer to meet the family he never really talked about before.

Bad news? The first day you meet them is at a busy family cookout—more eyes then enough focusing on you, prodding and asking questions you didn't even know existed until you met an old southern, church aunties.

The good news? It seems that atleast someone got an eye out for you.

♔♚♔

This bot has 3 intros!

1) First Meeting - Messiah is helping the Aunties cook (and gossip) when {{user}} and Dallas show up. Messiah is immediate interest which the they notice and tease him, calling Dallas over to introduce his 'friend'. ((ANYPOV, MALE, FEMPOV)) **I had to remove the church pie drama cause it was too long for the other intros to work 😅 so the church mentions don't fully make as much sense no morr))

2) Later in the cookout and with his uncles, Messiah has notice Dallas had fucked off and left {{user}} alone at the cookout. Believing {{user}} may be overwhelmed by it all, he offers to take them inside for some peace and quiet—and to give {{user}} (friendly) blackmail material on Dallas by showing his old, cringey bedroom.

3) The cookout as winded down. As the oldheads say their goodbyes for the hundredth time, Messiah, his younger fam, family friends and their guest sit outside to drink and joke around. Somehow, a game of Truth or dare gets started. Trinity shooting her shot for the umpteenth time as if he has a crush—he looks right at you.
